text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, yeah! If we avoid speaking to each<n>other
until our race, the tension will<n>build and build...
and that'll make our<n>competition feel even
fiercer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! It's all about starting with the<n>right
mindset. Ready? Starting... now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! I can't do it! I don't know if it's<n>tension
or what, but it just feels too<n>weird!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Right—we do share a room, after all. Notsaying a single word might be pushingit... Though on the other hand, the straincould make for a good ab workout.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You know, I think we'll just have<n>to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
—put it all on the table once we step<n>onto the
turf! That matches our style the<n>best!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But I'm going to win it, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Just try to catch me, Ines!
